vision: To be a globally recognized center of excellence in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science education and research.
mission: To provide quality education in AI & DS, foster innovation, and develop industry-ready professionals with ethical values.
peos: PEO1: Apply AI & Data Science knowledge to solve real-world problems.
PEO2: Pursue higher studies or professional careers in AI/DS domains.
PEO3: Demonstrate ethical and professional responsibilities.
psos: PSO1: Apply machine learning and data analytics techniques to complex datasets.
PSO2: Design and develop intelligent systems using modern AI frameworks.
hod_message: Welcome to the Department of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at NBKR Institute of Science and Technology. Our department is committed to providing world-class education in AI & DS to shape the future innovators.
about: The Department of AI & DS at NBKRIST was established to meet the growing demand for AI and Data Science professionals. We offer B.Tech in AI & DS with state-of-the-art labs, experienced faculty, and strong industry connections.

department.name: Department of Artificial Intelligence & Data Science

overview.description: The Department offers an undergraduate programme in Artificial Intelligence & Data Science. It focuses on providing high-quality education and training in state-of-the-art technologies while enhancing students' technical and soft skills.
objectives: Provide high-quality education in emerging technologies.
Enhance verbal communication and soft skills.
Prepare students for competitive industrial environments.

highlights: Focuses on all important aspects of computer science and emerging technologies.
Emphasizes soft skills, analytical capabilities, and verbal communication.
Prepares students to compete in the global technology industry.
Students have consistently excelled in highly competitive industrial environments.
Graduates have secured placements in top-ranking multinational companies (MNCs).

strengths.faculty: Dedicated faculty committed to delivering quality education.
strengths.curriculum: Well-planned curriculum aligned with industry requirements.
strengths.students: Talented students with excellent academic and placement records.
